messages.text: Hmm A gothram (or gotra) is a Hindu ancestral lineage or clan, tracing patrilineal descent back to an ancient sage or patriarch. It primarily serves as a way to identify one's extended family tree and prevents incestuous marriages by prohibiting unions between individuals of the same gothram.
